text: AI agents coordinate across 12 specialized roles: researcher, planner, coder, reviewer, executor, debugger, optimizer, monitor, communicator, integrator, validator, and orchestrator.
feature: Sprint 13 multi-icon list + AT LEAST 1 icon per unit rule

source.prompt: AI agents coordinate across 12 specialized roles: researcher, planner, coder, reviewer, executor, debugger, optimizer, monitor, communicator, integrator, validator, and orchestrator.

args.code: function setup(){createCanvas(600,360);noLoop();}function draw(){const bg=window.__brandingPalette.bg;const fg=window.__brandingPalette.silhouetteColor;background(bg[0],bg[1],bg[2]);const cx=300,cy=180,or=145,ir=52;const roles=[{name:'researcher',icon:'database'},{name:'planner',icon:'file'},{name:'coder',icon:'cube'},{name:'reviewer',icon:'check'},{name:'executor',icon:'lightning'},{name:'debugger',icon:'shield'},{name:'optimizer',icon:'chart-bar'},{name:'monitor',icon:'clock'},{name:'communicator',icon:'mail'},{name:'integrator',icon:'refresh'},{name:'validator',icon:'star'},{name:'orchestrator',icon:'globe'}];const n=roles.length;const nodePos=roles.map((_,i)=>{const a=(i/n)*Math.PI*2-Math.PI/2;return{x:cx+Math.cos(a)*or,y:cy+Math.sin(a)*or};});stroke(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],35);strokeWeight(1);for(let i=0;i<n;i++){for(let j=i+1;j<n;j++){if(Math.abs(i-j)<=2||Math.abs(i-j)>=n-2||(i===0&&j===6)||(i===1&&j===7)||(i===2&&j===8)||(i===3&&j===9)||(i===4&&j===10)||(i===5&&j===11)){line(nodePos[i].x,nodePos[i].y,nodePos[j].x,nodePos[j].y);}}}const orchIdx=11;for(let i=0;i<n-1;i++){stroke(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],55);strokeWeight(1.2);line(cx,cy,nodePos[i].x,nodePos[i].y);}noStroke();fill(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],220);ellipse(cx,cy,ir*2,ir*2);fill(bg[0],bg[1],bg[2]);ellipse(cx,cy,ir*2-8,ir*2-8);drawingContext.font='700 11px Inter';drawingContext.fillStyle='rgba('+fg[0]+','+fg[1]+','+fg[2]+',1)';drawingContext.textAlign='center';drawingContext.fillText('AGENT',cx,cy-6);drawingContext.fillText('HUB',cx,cy+8);const
